name: Cheat Downloader Offline
description: A NextUI pak for getting cheats from the Libretro github repo. Needs internet only for the initial database download.
author: nborodikhin

changelog.v1.4.0: Sort cheats ignoring case, fix overlapping in list selectors, rewrite app in Nim
changelog.v1.3.0: Use official builds of minui-list and minui-presenter, add tg5050 and my355 support
changelog.v1.2.0: Suppress buttons on downloading screen, restore last position in lists (using unofficial builds of minui-list and minui-presenter).
changelog.v1.1.0: Use zip file for faster cheat extraction time (supportied by packed miniz).
